messages.content: how to check how many units have been sold on amazon

To check how many units have been sold on Amazon, you can follow these steps:

1. Go to the Amazon Seller Central website (https://sellercentral.amazon.com/).

2. Log in to your seller account using your registered email address and password.

3. Once logged in, navigate to the "Reports" tab in the top menu and click on "Fulfillment".

4. From the drop-down menu, select "Amazon Fulfilled Shipments Report".

5. On the report search page, set the desired date range for which you want to check the sales.

6. Select the report type as "Summary" and click on the "Request Report" button.

7. Wait for a few minutes until the report is generated. Once the report is ready, it will appear under the "Manage Your Reports" section.

8. Click on the checkbox next to the generated report and then click on the "Download" button.

9. Open the downloaded report, which will be in CSV format, using a spreadsheet program like Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets.

10. Look for the column titled "Quantity Shipped" to find the number of units sold for each product.

By following these steps, you will be able to check how many units have been sold on Amazon within the specified date range.
can we check the same data for other sellers without login

No, you cannot check the sales data for other sellers on Amazon without logging in. Sales data is considered confidential information and is accessible only by the respective seller who owns the account. To view sales data for a specific seller, you would need to have access to their Amazon Seller Central account or have permission from the seller to access their sales information.
is there any other view to check that

No, there isn't any publicly available view or tool to check the sales data of other sellers on Amazon. Amazon maintains strict privacy and data protection policies, and as a result, seller-specific sales data is not accessible to the general public or other sellers on the platform. The sales data is confidential and can only be accessed by the individual sellers for their own account.
can we estimate the sellings from ratings

No, it is not possible to accurately estimate the sales volume based solely on product ratings on Amazon. Product ratings provide an indication of customer satisfaction and feedback but do not directly correlate to the number of units sold. Therefore, it is not a reliable method to estimate sales.

The ratings and reviews reflect the experiences and opinions of customers who have purchased and used the product. It can be influenced by various factors such as the product quality, pricing, customer service, and marketing efforts. However, factors like sales rank, Best Seller Rank (BSR), and other performance metrics on Amazon provide more useful insights into the sales performance of a particular product.
ok tell me the alternate way to check for the sales

As an external observer, you can use some alternative methods to estimate a product's sales on Amazon:

1. Best Seller Rank (BSR): The Best Seller Rank is an indicator of how well a product is selling within a specific category on Amazon. A lower BSR indicates higher sales volume and popularity. Although BSR doesn't provide precise sales figures, it offers a relative measure of a product's performance compared to others in the same category.

2. Market Research Tools: Various third-party market research tools like Jungle Scout, Helium 10, and AMZScout provide estimated sales data for products on Amazon. These tools analyze historical data, BSR, and other factors to provide an estimate of sales volume and trends. While not 100% accurate, they can give you a better idea of a product's sales potential.

3. Competitor Research: Analyze your competitor's product listings using tools like Keepa, Camelcamelcamel, or AmazeOwl. These tools track and display historical price and sales data for specific products, allowing you to gain insights into their sales performance.

4. Amazon Advertising Reports: If you are running Amazon PPC (Pay-Per-Click) advertising campaigns, you can access advertising reports in Amazon Seller Central. These reports provide information on ad impressions, clicks, and conversions. Analyzing the conversion rate from ad clicks to sales can give you an idea of how well a product is selling.

It's important to note that these methods provide estimations and are not precise indicators of sales figures. Only the individual seller has access to accurate sales data for their own products on Amazon.

To use Keepa, a tool for tracking and analyzing product pricing and sales history on Amazon, you can follow these steps:

1. Visit the Keepa website (https://keepa.com/) and create a free account or log in if you already have one.

2. Once logged in, you will see a search bar at the top of the page. Enter the name or ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number) of the product you want to track in the search bar.

3. Keepa will display a graph showcasing the product's price history, sales rank, and various other data points.

4. Use the options on the left sidebar to customize the view of the graph. You can select different time ranges, adjust the granularity of data, and choose which specific data points to include.

5. Hovering over any point on the graph will display detailed information about the price, sales rank, and offers available at that time.

6. You can also set price and sales rank alerts for a product by clicking on the "Set Alert" button. This feature notifies you via email or browser push notifications when the price or sales rank meets your specified criteria.

7. Keepa also provides additional features like category tracking, product comparison, and sales rank tracking for multiple products in the same graph.

Remember that Keepa offers a free version with limited features, but also offers a paid subscription for more advanced capabilities.

By using Keepa, you can gain insights into a product's pricing and sales history, track fluctuations over time, and make more informed decisions when researching products to sell or buy on Amazon.
where can i find asin of the product on amazon page

To find the ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number) of a product on Amazon, you can follow these steps:

1. Open the product's page on Amazon.

2. Scroll down the page until you reach the "Product Information" section.

3. Look for a section labeled "Product Details" or "Product Information." The ASIN is usually listed in this section.

4. Alternatively, you can also check the URL of the product page. The ASIN is often included in the URL after the "/dp/" or "/dpid/" portion.

Please note that not all products may display the ASIN in the same location, but it is typically found in the product details section or within the URL. The ASIN is a unique identifier assigned to each product listing on Amazon and can be used to search and track specific products on platforms like Keepa or other Amazon research tools.
is there any tool to check for sales in ksa

Yes, there are various tools available to check for sales and product performance on Amazon in Saudi Arabia (KSA). Some popular tools that can provide insights into sales data and performance metrics specific to the Saudi Arabian marketplace include:

1. Helium 10: Helium 10 offers tools for market research, keyword research, and product tracking specifically tailored for Amazon sellers in different marketplaces, including Saudi Arabia.

2. Jungle Scout: Jungle Scout provides data and analytics for Amazon sellers, including sales estimates, product tracking, and competition analysis for various Amazon marketplaces, including Saudi Arabia.

3. IO Scout: IO Scout is an all-in-one tool for Amazon sellers that includes product research, sales tracking, profitability analysis, and other features tailored to different Amazon marketplaces, including Saudi Arabia.

3. AMZScout: AMZScout offers a suite of tools to help Amazon sellers with product research, sales tracking, and competitor analysis for different Amazon marketplaces, including Saudi Arabia.

These tools can provide valuable insights into sales performance, market trends, and product opportunities specifically for the Saudi Arabian marketplace. It's recommended to explore the available features, pricing plans, and user reviews of these tools to determine which one best suits your needs.
how to check product sale on helium 10 for amazon saudi arabia

Currently, Helium 10 does not directly provide sales data for product sales on Amazon Saudi Arabia (KSA) as part of its standard features. However, you can still use Helium 10 for other aspects of selling on Amazon KSA, such as product research, keyword research, and competition analysis.

To explore the sales volume of specific products on Amazon Saudi Arabia, you may need to rely on other methods such as using Amazon's Best Seller Rank (BSR) or conducting manual research.

1. Best Seller Rank (BSR): On the product detail page on Amazon, you can find the BSR information in the product information section or on the "Product Details" page. BSR provides a relative ranking of a product's sales performance in its respective category. A lower BSR indicates higher sales. By comparing the BSR across different products, you can have an estimate of the sales performance.

2. Manual Research: You can manually research the sales volume of products on Amazon KSA by looking at customer reviews, product ratings, and customer discussions. Although this method is not as accurate as sales data, it can provide some insights into the popularity and demand for a product.

It's worth noting that sales data for Amazon Saudi Arabia may become available in Helium 10 in the future as the marketplace continues to grow. It's always recommended to stay updated with the latest features and announcements from Helium 10 to leverage its tools for Amazon KSA.
